description: Classic tapering monk strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. The slim, sleek silhouetting on this stylish shoe with appropriate stitch detailing gives this an elegant profile. Style this with tonal, flat front trousers, a blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel and midfoot Sitch detailing on the overlay seams on the forefoot Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Two straps across the midfoot with mock tang buckles Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the midfoot and forefoor for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
